title: Sales Outcome Distribution
description: product-spec.md §13.6. Implements D1 and D2. Every percentile set here shares one simulation_id, so the reported figures are jointly consistent. Marginals from this object must never be combined arithmetically to synthesize a new figure (§12.5) -- compute per draw instead.

additional_days_to_sale.description: Days from as_of until sale. Downside tail is P90. Draws not selling within horizon_days are censored, not extrapolated.

projected_total_inventory_age.description: days_in_inventory + additional_days_to_sale, computed per draw. The §20.2 age warnings evaluate against this, not against additional_days_to_sale. Downside tail is P90.

transaction_price.description: Downside tail is P10, per §12.4 and the risk-direction table.

sale_probabilities.description: Direct draw counts, not normal approximations. The underlying distribution is skewed and bounded.

projected_age_exceedance.description: P(projected_total_inventory_age > threshold). Drives the §20.2 age warnings.

censored_fraction.description: Share of draws that did not sell within the horizon. A vehicle whose P90 is genuinely beyond the horizon must not report a precise-looking number.
